**format-check (ruff format --check):** FAILED - 2 files would be reformatted: - /home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py - /home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/test_reconcile.py - 1,639 files already formatted
